hero.subtitle: Kazumi Clinic · Aesthetic Medicine, Sukhumvit

AboutPage.metaDescription: Get to know {siteName}, a beauty clinic in Sukhumvit, Bangkok, and {doctorName} {doctorRole}. Clinic License No. {license}

philosophy.desc1: {siteName} embraces Japanese minimalist beauty philosophy, focusing on subtle enhancement. Our doctors assess and plan your care in a calm and private environment.
philosophy.desc2: Providing Fillers, Botox, IV Drip, Skin Boosters, and Collagen Boosters, prioritizing safety and natural results.

director.note: Care plans and results vary depending on the doctor's assessment and individual conditions.

physician.note: Care plans and results vary depending on the doctor's assessment and individual conditions.

consultation.title: Book a Consultation
consultation.description: Every procedure starts with a detailed facial assessment and individual goal planning by a doctor.

hero.subtitle: Clinical Services
